authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(95) — Mill Creek (Mono Co. tributary to West Walker River)
sources.quotedText: (95) Mill Creek (Mono Co. tributary to West Walker River) and tributaries upstream from confluence with Lost Cannon Creek. All year. Only artificial flies with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: West Walker River | Fishing | Visit Mono County
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Applies to Mill Creek and tributaries upstream from the confluence with Lost Cannon Creek.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only, upstream from confluence with Lost Cannon Creek
regulations.verbatimText: Mill Creek (Mono Co. tributary to West Walker River) and tributaries upstream from confluence with Lost Cannon Creek. All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial flies with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Fly fishing only, barbless hooks required
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial flies with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 0 trout — all trout caught must be released; catch-and-release only.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch-and-release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
